meanings.definition: the act of drawing a plan or diagram or outline
a drawing created by superimposing a semitransparent sheet of paper on the original image and copying on it the lines of the original image
the discovery and description of the course of development of something
follow, discover, or ascertain the course of development of something
examples: We must follow closely the economic development is Cuba

meanings.definition: make a mark or lines on a surface
examples: trace the outline of a figure in the sand
we retraced the route we took last summer
The hunters traced the deer into the woods
the detectives hounded the suspect until they found him
She traced the circumstances of her birth

meanings.definition: make one's course or travel along a path; travel or pass over, around, or along
examples: The children traced along the edge of the dark forest

meanings.definition: copy by following the lines of the original drawing on a transparent sheet placed upon it; make a tracing of
